role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and settlement patterns consistent with the Arabian Peninsula.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Prosopis) and their suitability to the arid environment.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure (curbs, guardrails) and identified the flag as a regulatory/national symbol.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and flag colors to distinguish between regional candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Qatar by leveraging the definitive visual cue of the national flag. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, with the regulatory and meta agents providing the critical evidence needed to disambiguate Qatar from its regional neighbors (UAE, Saudi Arabia).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of sandy soil and white villas match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of xeric trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of curbs and guardrails match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the flag and architecture match the image.
